title: hornungia alpina subsp. alpina
intro: Hornungia alpina subsp. alpina, also known as Alpine hornungia, is a rare and endangered plant species native to the European Alps. It is a perennial herb with yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Alpine hornungia include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting the treatment of various infections and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
